title: View 2023 Annual General Membership Meeting
summary: TAP TO VIEW 2023 ANNUAL GENERAL MEMBERSHIP MEETING Click the link above to view the 2023 Annual General Membership Meeting live at 10 a.m. Alaska Time on Saturday, Oct. 7, 2023. Participants may join the meeting 10 minutes prior or anytime during the meeting.

title: USDA to host virtual Data Users’ Meeting to gather public input on statistical programs
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) will hold its biannual Data Users’ Meeting virtually via Zoom for Government Oct. 17-18 from noon-3 p.m. EDT. The Data Users’ Meeting is held to share recent and pending statistical program changes with the public a...
